33	#[post("/login", data = "<body>")]
34	pub async fn login(
35	    pool: &State<MySqlPool>,
36	    session_config: &State<SessionConfig>,
37	    cookies: &CookieJar<'_>,
38	    body: Json<LoginRequest>,
39	) -> Result<Json<ApiResponse<LoginResponse>>, (Status, Json<ApiResponse<()>>)> {
40	    let user = crate::db::users::find_by_username(pool.inner(), &body.username)
41	        .await
42	        .ok_or_else(|| {
43	            (
44	                Status::Unauthorized,
45	                Json(ApiResponse {
46	                    success: false,
47	                    data: None,
48	                    error: Some("Invalid username or password".into()),
49	                }),
50	            )
51	        })?;
52	
53	    let valid = bcrypt::verify(&body.password, &user.password_hash).unwrap_or(false);
54	    if !valid {
55	        return Err((
56	            Status::Unauthorized,
57	            Json(ApiResponse {
58	                success: false,
59	                data: None,
60	                error: Some("Invalid username or password".into()),
61	            }),
62	        ));
63	    }
64	
65	    let roles = crate::db::users::get_user_roles(pool.inner(), user.id).await;
66	
67	    // Create session in DB
68	    let session_id = crate::services::session::create_session_id();
69	    let _ = crate::db::sessions::create_session(pool.inner(), &session_id, user.id, None, None)
70	        .await;
71	
72	    // Sign the session cookie and set it on the response (for browsers).
73	    let signed_cookie_value = crate::services::session::sign_cookie(session_config.inner(), &session_id);
74	    let cookie = Cookie::build(("brewflow_session", signed_cookie_value.clone()))
75	        .http_only(true)
76	        .same_site(SameSite::Strict)
77	        .secure(true)
78	        .path("/")
79	        .max_age(rocket::time::Duration::seconds(
80	            session_config.idle_timeout_secs as i64,
81	        ));
82	    cookies.add(cookie);
83	
84	    let info = UserInfo {
85	        id: user.id,
86	        username: user.username,
87	        display_name: user.display_name,
88	        roles,
89	        preferred_locale: user.preferred_locale,
90	    };
91	
92	    // Return the signed cookie value in the body so that WASM/API clients that
93	    // cannot rely on the browser cookie jar can attach it manually.
94	    Ok(Json(ApiResponse {
95	        success: true,
96	        data: Some(LoginResponse { session_cookie: signed_cookie_value, user: info }),
97	        error: None,
98	    }))
99	}

101	#[post("/register", data = "<body>")]
102	pub async fn register(
103	    pool: &State<MySqlPool>,
104	    body: Json<RegisterRequest>,
105	) -> Result<Json<ApiResponse<UserInfo>>, (Status, Json<ApiResponse<()>>)> {
106	    // Validate password policy
107	    if let Err(violations) = crate::services::auth::validate_password(&body.password) {
108	        return Err((
109	            Status::BadRequest,
110	            Json(ApiResponse {
111	                success: false,
112	                data: None,
113	                error: Some(violations.join("; ")),
114	            }),
115	        ));
116	    }
117	
118	    // Check if username already exists
119	    if crate::db::users::find_by_username(pool.inner(), &body.username)
120	        .await
121	        .is_some()
122	    {
123	        return Err((
124	            Status::Conflict,
125	            Json(ApiResponse {
126	                success: false,
127	                data: None,
128	                error: Some("Username already exists".into()),
129	            }),
130	        ));
131	    }
132	
133	    let hash = bcrypt::hash(&body.password, bcrypt::DEFAULT_COST).map_err(|_| {
134	        (
135	            Status::InternalServerError,
136	            Json(ApiResponse {
137	                success: false,
138	                data: None,
139	                error: Some("Failed to hash password".into()),
140	            }),
141	        )
142	    })?;
143	
144	    let user_id = crate::db::users::create_user(
145	        pool.inner(),
146	        &body.username,
147	        &hash,
148	        body.display_name.as_deref(),
149	        body.email.as_deref(),
150	        "en",
151	    )
152	    .await
153	    .map_err(|_| {
154	        (
155	            Status::InternalServerError,
156	            Json(ApiResponse {
157	                success: false,
158	                data: None,
159	                error: Some("Failed to create user".into()),
160	            }),
161	        )
162	    })?;
163	
164	    // Assign role (default to Customer if not specified)
165	    let role = body.role.as_deref().unwrap_or("Customer");
166	    let valid_roles = ["Customer", "Staff", "Teacher", "AcademicAffairs", "Admin"];
167	    let role = if valid_roles.contains(&role) { role } else { "Customer" };
168	    let _ = crate::db::users::assign_role(pool.inner(), user_id, role).await;
169	    let roles = crate::db::users::get_user_roles(pool.inner(), user_id).await;
170	
171	    Ok(Json(ApiResponse {
172	        success: true,
173	        data: Some(UserInfo {
174	            id: user_id,
175	            username: body.username.clone(),
176	            display_name: body.display_name.clone(),
177	            roles,
178	            preferred_locale: "en".into(),
179	        }),
180	        error: None,
181	    }))
182	}

184	#[post("/logout")]
185	pub async fn logout(
186	    pool: &State<MySqlPool>,
187	    session_config: &State<SessionConfig>,
188	    cookies: &CookieJar<'_>,
189	) -> Json<ApiResponse<()>> {
190	    if let Some(cookie) = cookies.get("brewflow_session") {
191	        if let Some(session_id) =
192	            crate::services::session::verify_cookie(session_config.inner(), cookie.value())
193	        {
194	            let _ = crate::db::sessions::delete_session(pool.inner(), &session_id).await;
195	        }
196	    }
197	
198	    cookies.remove(Cookie::build("brewflow_session").path("/"));
199	
200	    Json(ApiResponse {
201	        success: true,
202	        data: None,
203	        error: None,
204	    })
205	}

4	pub async fn create_attempt(
5	    pool: &MySqlPool,
6	    user_id: i64,
7	    exam_version_id: i64,
8	    total_questions: i32,

11	        "INSERT INTO exam_attempts (user_id, exam_version_id, total_questions, correct_count, status)

10	**My Understanding**: Voucher codes are sensitive — storing plaintext enables enumeration attacks. They should be stored as a hash for lookup and encrypted for display.  
11	**Solution**: Voucher codes are SHA-256 hashed before storage in the `vouchers.code` and `reservations.voucher_code` columns (VARCHAR(64)). The original code is only held in memory during the request lifecycle.

13	### Session cookie vs JWT
14	**Question**: The prompt specifies rotating HMAC-signed session cookies as the primary auth mechanism. Should JWT be supported at all?  
15	**My Understanding**: JWT bearer tokens are useful for API clients (e.g. mobile apps, scripts) that cannot use cookies. They should be supported as a fallback but with equivalent security controls.  
16	**Solution**: The auth guard accepts both cookie sessions and JWT bearer tokens. JWT expiry is capped at 30 minutes to match the cookie idle timeout. Cookie sessions rotate every 5 minutes to prevent fixation.

18	### Reservation lock quantity handling
19	**Question**: When a customer adds quantity > 1 of an item to the cart, should the reservation lock decrement stock by the full quantity?  
20	**My Understanding**: Yes — the lock must reserve the exact quantity requested to prevent oversell.  
21	**Solution**: The lock acquisition passes the cart item quantity to the reservation service, which validates `stock >= requested_quantity` and decrements by that amount. The lock row stores the reserved quantity for release on cancellation.

All 10 issues are fixed. Here's a summary of every change:

### Blocker Fixes

1. **Public registration role escalation** — Backend now hardcodes `"Customer"` role on registration, ignoring any client-supplied role. Removed the `role` field from `RegisterRequest` and the role dropdown from the frontend registration form.

2. **Hold-expiry local/UTC mismatch** — Changed `chrono::Local::now().naive_local()` to `chrono::Utc::now().naive_utc()` in `orders.rs:194` so `hold_expires_at` is consistent with the UTC comparisons in `confirm_order` and the frontend `HoldTimer`.

3. **Analytics enum case mismatch** — Changed `'completed'` to `'Completed'` in all three analytics queries (`get_user_score_analytics`, `get_subject_stats`, `get_difficulty_breakdown`) to match the MySQL ENUM definition `'Completed'`.

4. **Degradation-aware scheduling not used** — The runtime loop in `main.rs` now filters `get_due_jobs()` results through `should_run()`, which checks whether the corresponding service is degraded before executing.

5. **Critical jobs auto-disabled** — `record_job_failure` now skips auto-disabling for critical jobs (`is_critical == true`), only auto-disabling non-critical jobs after max failures.

6. **Store-hours weekday mapping** — Fixed frontend to use `0=Sunday, 1=Monday, ..., 6=Saturday` matching the database schema comment, instead of the previous `1=Mon..7=Sun` mapping.

### Medium Fixes

7. **Voucher mismatch warning** — Added an optional "Order ID" input field to the staff scan form so `order_id` is actually sent to the backend, enabling the mismatch check to trigger and display warnings.

8. **Product list query params** — Added `ProductQuery` struct with `featured` and `limit` parameters to the `list_products` endpoint. The `limit` param now truncates results accordingly.

9. **Date/time localization** — Added `format_datetime()` helper to the orders frontend. All timestamps (created_at, pickup slots, fulfillment timeline) are now formatted as `"Jan 15, 2024 10:30"` (en) or `"2024年01月15日 10:30"` (zh).

10. **Documentation conflicts** — Removed "JWT bearer fallback" claim from `docs/design.md` and updated `docs/questions.md` to reflect the cookie-only auth implementation.
